content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

August 26, 2009


Dena J. Heathman
Senior Vice President
Orange County Fair and Event Center
88 Fair Drive
Costa Mesa, California 92626

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-09-141

Dear Ms. Heathman:

This letter responds to your request for advice regarding the gift provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act"), specifically, the provisions of Regulation 18944.1. The Act requires the Commission to provide written advice to any person whose duties under the Act are in question or to that person's authorized representative. (Section 83114(b); Regulation 18329(a), copy enclosed.) However, the Commission may decline to provide written advice if it would be inappropriate or otherwise not in the public interest to do so. (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(F).)

Formal written advice is the application of law to a given set of facts provided by the requestor and has the purpose of conferring immunity to the requestor. (Section 83114; Regulation 18329(b)(7).) After a careful review of the facts you provided, we decline to provide written advice to you at this time. The same or very similar issues are currently the subject of a pending complaint in the Commission's Enforcement Division.

Please note that our decision is not a determination of the questions posed in your request. In addition, nothing in the Act prevents you from seeking legal advice from your agency's counsel or private counsel.

________________________

¹ The Political Reform Act is contained in Government Code Sections 81000 through 91014. All statutory references are to the Government Code, unless otherwise indicated. The regulations of the Fair Political Practices Commission are contained in Sections 18110 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California Code of Regulations. All regulatory references are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations, unless otherwise indicated.

File No. W-09-141
Page No. 2


If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: William J. Benkeit
Senior Counsel, Legal Division

WJL:jgl

Enclosure

sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC declined to provide formal written advice because the same or similar issues are the subject of a pending complaint in the Commission's Enforcement Division. The requestor may seek legal advice from agency counsel or private counsel instead.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Declination letter with clear basis for refusal. No formal question or conclusion sections present in document, but substance of request and declination reasoning are evident. Document structured as correspondence rather than traditional advice letter format.
